name: EuiPinnableListGroup

listItems.description:
Extends `EuiListGroupItemProps`, at the very least, expecting a `label`.
See {@link EuiPinnableListGroupItemProps}

onPinClick.description:
Shows the pin icon and calls this function on click.
Returns `item: EuiPinnableListGroupItemProps`

pinTitle.description:
The pin icon needs a title/aria-label for accessibility.
It is a function that passes the item back and must return a string `(item) => string`.
Default is `"Pin item"`

unpinTitle.description:
The unpin icon needs a title/aria-label for accessibility.
It is a function that passes the item back and must return a string `(item) => string`.
Default is `"Unpin item"`

bordered.description: Add a border to the list container

flush.description: Remove container padding, stretching list items to the edges

color.description: Change the colors of all `listItems` at once

size.description: Change the size of all `listItems` at once

maxWidth.description:
Sets the max-width of the page.
Set to `true` to use the default size,
set to `false` to not restrict the width,
or set to a number/string for a custom CSS width/measurement.

showToolTips.description: Display tooltips on all list items

wrapText.description: Allow link text to wrap vs truncated

example: <EuiPinnableListGroup label="First item with pinned: true" pinned />
